# Calibration Parameters

Submission for AMS Exercise 4 by Ken Schlesiger and Luis Alvarez.

The calibration was computed from multiple chessboard observations with a
640x480 camera stream. Angles are reported as Euler angles in radians. The
translation values are expressed in chessboard-square units, because the object
points in the program use one unit per square.

## Intrinsic Matrix

```text
K =
[660.0381836895866, 0, 315.952445979791;
 0, 660.1702745351153, 229.9783072067786;
 0, 0, 1]
```

## Distortion Coefficients

```text
[0.0774595326694079,
 -0.9822995703352496,
  0.001853001111686757,
  0.0004869717236538896,
  2.010310818542591]
```
